rootNode.ResponseMSG: The INSERT statement conflicted with the FOREIGN KEY constraint "fk_ResourceCosting_ledgerId". The conflict occurred in database "JobCardPivotal", table "dbo.tbl_Ledger", column 'LedgerId'. The statement has been terminated.
